violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Need to add sanitizer to bucket.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside upright refrigerator.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges in kitchen need cleaned.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Hot dogs 128F. -Meat balls 108F.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Handwash not set up.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwash sink needs to be supplied with water during all hours of operation.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. -Need to control ants in back dishwash area.
